learn.core_idea: Asynchronous terminal writes also rely on IRQ completion to unblock and continue execution.
mechanism_steps: Write syscall dispatches to kernel path.
IRQ wakeup restores runnable state and returns.
learn.worked_example: sys.write appears before wakeup and final completion metrics reach target.
common_mistakes: Checking only end state without event path.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can find sys.write trace events.
I can verify wakeup after device completion.
I can confirm process exits successfully.
